title: Custom Cursor Reload
body: # Customize your cursor ## **If the mod reports an error, please do not submit any error reports to the original mod!!!** Allow you to customize your cursor within the game, setting its size and display style. When using the Fabric version, if you want to modify the style or size of the cursor on the server, please exit your server, enter single player, enter the ``` /customcursor ``` command to open the GUI of the mod, and then config it. This Mod is a ported version of [Cursor Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/cursormod) Retained the functionality of the original Mod and added a new feature: adjusting the size of each cursor display. The currently supported Forge/NeoForge version is 1.20+
